title: Quick Shell
shortDescription: Open saved project folders in any terminal you use — Windows Terminal profiles, WSL, PowerShell, cmd, and more.
description:
Quick Shell saves folders you open often and launches them from Command Palette in the terminal you already use.

- Save workspaces with optional home keywords for root-palette search
- Every Windows Terminal and Intelligent Terminal profile on your PC, plus WSL and classic shells
- Run a command on open (dev servers, scripts, and more)
- Create, edit, pin, import, and export shortcuts inside Command Palette
- Undo and redo edits; open elevated when needed

After installing from the Microsoft Store, open Command Palette and run "Reload Command Palette Extension", then search for Quick Shell.
